headline: Stocks Rally as Buyers Return After AI-Led Selloff
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +1.01%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.46%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +2.39%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +1.00%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: SLB OneSubsea Secures Subsea Boosting Contract for bp’s Thunder Horse Project in Gulf of America
summary: HOUSTON, June 08, 2026--Global energy technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) today announced that its OneSubsea™ joint venture has been awarded a contract by bp to provide a subsea boosting system for the Thunder Horse project, a development in the deepwater portion of Gulf of America.
